// A9.13: Meteor Galaxy manifest. Required by `meteor deploy --settings settings-production.json employed.co.mz`. The operator still has to supply the runtime settings file out-of-band and configure DNS/SSL in the Galaxy console.
// nodeVersion note: Galaxy currently pins to 14.21.4 for Meteor 2.7.1 deployments. If/when A9.11 ships to staging successfully with Node 18, update this to 18.20.x.

settings.// instructions: Galaxy reads METEOR_SETTINGS from the settings file passed to `meteor deploy --settings ...`. Do not commit production keys here.

env.// instructions: Set ROOT_URL, MONGO_URL, MAIL_URL, and any provider-specific keys (Stripe, reCAPTCHA, Sentry DSN) in the Galaxy app dashboard, not here.
